description_long: This is a rustic wooden handcart with a rectangular cargo bed constructed from dark wooden planks, reinforced by side rails and crossbars for added stability. The cart features two large spoked wooden wheels mounted on either side, allowing for easy rolling over uneven surfaces. The front of the cart extends into two long wooden handles, designed for manual pulling or pushing. The load platform consists of parallel wooden slats, providing a sturdy yet slightly open surface for carrying goods. The side rails are elevated, helping to contain items during transport, while the rear of the cart is partially enclosed with angled wooden planks. The overall construction suggests durability and functionality, suitable for transporting various items in an urban or rural setting.
description: A dark wooden handcart with large spoked wheels, side rails, and a slatted cargo bed, designed for manual transport of goods.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the cart, large spoked wheel, and extended handles.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the dual handles, open slatted platform, and side rails.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the second wheel, side rails, and the length of the handles.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the angled rear planks and the open cargo area between the side rails.
